summary: Completed comprehensive testing of route map display, dashboard redesign, homepage updates, and admin display_order features. All requested features verified working correctly.

issues: Console hydration warnings about <tr> inside <span> and <span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic React warning, doesn't affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: All route map features implemented and working. Dashboard has 2-column layout with stats on left and route map image on right. Progress bar with milestones at bottom. Homepage challenge cards show route maps below description. Admin display_order inputs have min=1 and Math.max(1,...) clamping on save.

homepage.challenge_cards_route_maps: PASS - Route maps displayed BELOW description with object-contain, not cropped
homepage.footer_monsheila_contact: PASS - Footer shows 'For any questions regarding the walk or the app, please contact Monsheila at monsheila@kenyaeducationfund.org'
homepage.cta_text: PASS - 'Every step you walk brings a Kenyan student closer to their dreams'

onboarding.challenge_selection_route_maps: PASS - Code verified: route_map_url displayed below challenge info with object-contain class (lines 231-235)

dashboard.two_column_layout: PASS - Stats (2x2 grid) on LEFT, Route map image on RIGHT
dashboard.no_top_progress_bar: PASS - Old top progress bar with background image overlay REMOVED
dashboard.bottom_progress_bar: PASS - Single bold progress bar at bottom with milestone markers, labels, distances, and picture placeholders
dashboard.challenge_title_and_next_milestone: PASS - 'Your Current Challenge' and 'Next Milestone' shown above stats

admin_display_order.math_max_clamping: PASS - Code verified: Math.max(1, parseInt(form.display_order) || 1) on save for all three
